mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, merchant.id AS merchantId FROM sys_user u JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = u.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.status = 'ENABLED' AND ma.member_type = 'MERCHANT' JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id AND merchant.deleted = 0 AND merchant.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(r.id AS CHAR) AS id, r.auth_type AS authType, r.target_id AS targetId, CASE r.auth_type WHEN 'BRAND' THEN brand.brand_name WHEN 'CATEGORY' THEN category.category_name ELSE sku.sku_name END AS targetName, r.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(r.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(r.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS endTime, r.remark AS remark FROM goods_auth_rule r JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = r.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = merchant.member_id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} LEFT JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = r.target_id AND r.auth_type = 'BRAND' AND brand.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category category ON category.id = r.target_id AND r.auth_type = 'CATEGORY' AND category.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = r.target_id AND r.auth_type = 'PRODUCT' AND sku.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.updated_time DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods_auth_rule ( merchant_id, auth_type, target_id, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{merchantId}, #{authType}, #{targetId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), remark = VALUES(remark), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(r.id AS CHAR) AS id, r.member_level AS memberLevel, r.target_type AS targetType, r.target_id AS targetId, CASE r.target_type WHEN 'BRAND' THEN brand.brand_name WHEN 'CATEGORY' THEN category.category_name WHEN 'PRODUCT' THEN CONCAT(spu.spu_name, ' / ', sku.sku_name) ELSE NULL END AS targetName, r.discount_rate AS discountRate, r.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(r.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(r.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS endTime, r.remark AS remark FROM level_discount_rule r JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = r.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = merchant.member_id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} LEFT JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = r.target_id AND r.target_type = 'BRAND' AND brand.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category category ON category.id = r.target_id AND r.target_type = 'CATEGORY' AND category.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = r.target_id AND r.target_type = 'PRODUCT' AND sku.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.updated_time DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO level_discount_rule ( merchant_id, member_level, target_type, target_id, category_id, discount_rate, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{merchantId}, #{memberLevel}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetId}, #{discountRate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE target_type = VALUES(target_type), target_id = VALUES(target_id), category_id = VALUES(category_id), discount_rate = VALUES(discount_rate), status = VALUES(status), remark = VALUES(remark), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(r.id AS CHAR) AS id, r.customer_id AS customerId, customer.company_name AS customerName, r.sku_id AS skuId, sku.sku_name AS skuName, spu.spu_name AS spuName, mg.sale_price AS salePrice, r.special_price AS specialPrice, r.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(r.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(r.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS endTime, r.remark AS remark FROM customer_price_rule r JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = r.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = merchant.member_id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = r.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = r.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.merchant_id = r.merchant_id AND mg.sku_id = r.sku_id AND mg.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.updated_time DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_price_rule ( merchant_id, customer_id, sku_id, special_price, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{merchantId}, #{customerId}, #{skuId}, #{specialPrice}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE special_price = VALUES(special_price), status = VALUES(status), remark = VALUES(remark), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(sku.id AS CHAR) AS value, CONCAT(spu.spu_name, ' / ', sku.sku_name) AS label FROM merchant_goods mg JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = mg.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = merchant.member_id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = mg.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 WHERE mg.deleted = 0 ORDER BY mg.id DESC

SELECT discount_rate AS discountRate FROM level_discount_rule WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED' AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND member_level = #{memberLevel} AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= NOW()) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= NOW()) AND ( (target_type = 'SKU' AND target_id = #{skuId}) OR (target_type = 'BRAND' AND target_id = #{brandId}) OR (target_type = 'CATEGORY' AND target_id = #{categoryId}) ) ORDER BY CASE target_type WHEN 'SKU' THEN 1 WHEN 'BRAND' THEN 2 WHEN 'CATEGORY' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END LIMIT 1
